visual_summary: The image shows a computer lab with multiple rows of desks, each equipped with an iMac, keyboard, and mouse. The room has neutral colored walls, a white ceiling with fluorescent lights, and a blackboard with some writing on it. There is one person seated at the back of the room, facing away from the camera.
continuity_anchors: row of identical iMacs with keyboards and mice
person seated at the back in a black chair
light gray walls and ceiling lights
plausible_actions: person entering or leaving the room
cinematic_notes: use wide shots to emphasize the orderly rows of computers
spotlight or soft lighting to highlight individual users
angle shots from behind the seated person to create a sense of focus or isolation
capture reflections on screens for a modern tech feel

visual_summary: The image shows an urban alleyway scene viewed through a large window from inside a building. The alley is bordered by tall commercial buildings with glass and concrete facades, with some lights on inside the offices. The street below appears wet and somewhat deserted, with a dumpster and some utility structures visible.
location: Urban city alleyway between office buildings
continuity_anchors: large window with metal frame and roller blind
dark office buildings with multiple lit windows
concrete building wall on the right
wet street surface with a dumpster
plausible_actions: camera pans to the street entrance
lighting change to indicate time passing
close-up on window or interior details
cinematic_notes: use the window frame for natural framing of the alley scene
capture reflections and wet street surface for texture
low lighting to enhance moody, urban atmosphere
possibility of time-lapse to show office lights turning on/off
